title: Senior Teacher - SSC Tube - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - SSC Tube - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
